sections.content: Leaders are always on stage. Every action, every reaction, every facial expression they put, is being watched and interpreted by a lot of people. Theatre being an open ended and participatory platform, makes it a persuasive medium for corporate learning. Theatre provides a new paradigm for training which connects not only intellect, but also the heart. Interactive theatre as medium, helps you break out of your ‘personality prisons’ and develop better interpersonal relationships, to foster better work environment and boost productivity. ‘Corporate Dramebaaz’ is a one day highly immersive workshop utilising theatre methodologies like forum theatre, improv, acting & expressing as well as role plays. It provides relevant scenarios which help participants feel a sense of recognition, transition and development by identifying their own issues and finding solutions to it. It also builds the ‘Emotional Quotient’ which is the key to success for any individual as well as the organization.

content: Learn cognitive techniques to understand your personality and communication styles
Practice emotional intelligence by understanding and controlling emotions
Use body language and expressions to convey the nonverbal message effectively
Learn how to use improvisation techniques to respond and control unique situations for constructive outcomes
Experience forum theatre to gain insight into the perspectives and outlook of stakeholders
Identify the gaps in the behaviour patterns and learn to find unique solutions
